description: Composition:Black round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking Remove promptly 5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only 7. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Comfort FitBe a champion for the ferocious, striped cat and show your earth warrior spirit with this black, tiger print tee from tantra. Team this up with jeans or cargoes for casual outings or hanging out with friends.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
